normalization.notes: Store encoded Ogham in NFC with start and end marks preserved. Keep horizontal digital text distinct from stone-edge orientation and do not infer Old Irish pronunciation from transliteration alone.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Ogham letters, aicme groups, start and end marks, formulaic chunks, transliteration values, and stone-orientation notes
segmentation.notes: Ogham may be displayed horizontally in Unicode but many inscriptions are read along stone edges with vertical or edge-following orientation. Runtime examples need explicit orientation and transliteration metadata.

sources.license: Unicode License reviewed for metadata use
sources.notes: Ogham block metadata for encoded letters, start mark, end mark, and space mark.

sources.license: project terms and attribution require review
sources.notes: Scoring and discovery source for inscription formulae and stone contexts. Do not ship copied records.

sources.license: edition copyright and citation requirements require review
